role_in_text: Developer of the HD I/O system
occurrence_sentence: It comes at a lower price point than conventional coaxial cables with the closest high-density coax alternative having 168 channels per port. The HD I/O system is available for all Cri/oFlex products and is known for its ultra-small formfactor due to its flexible strip-line design with integrated components for signal conditioning.

occurrence_sentence: We rely on companies like Delft Circuits to develop ready-to-use, high-density solutions, like their new High-Density Input/Output (HD I/O) system.
